_meta.purpose: Manifest of external Qur'an text corpora used for source matching. The actual corpus files are NOT bundled in this repository — the user must obtain them under the upstream license terms and place them under scripts/_raw/. The match-sources script reads them locally and produces a match report; nothing in this manifest authorises copying or redistributing the underlying texts.
_meta.policyNote: Source matching produces evidence about whether the curated readings already in quranData.json match an external corpus character-for-character. It is NOT scholar verification. An exact match may justify replacing a manual_placeholder source id with a real source id; it does NOT permit promoting confidence to verified.

tanzil-hafs-uthmani.label: Tanzil Uthmani — Hafs ʿan ʿĀṣim
tanzil-hafs-uthmani.licenseNote: User must manually accept Tanzil terms before download. Attribution required; no modification of the text.
tanzil-hafs-uthmani.notes: Full Tanzil Hafs Uthmani corpus. Downloaded from https://tanzil.net/download/ on 2026-05-04 after accepting Tanzil license terms (attribution required; no modification of text). Format: surah|ayah|text per line. 6266 lines (6236 verses + 30 lines of header/footer comments). Replaces an earlier 1.5 KB hand-extracted 8-verse subset.

kfgqpc-warsh.label: KFGQPC Warsh ʿan Nāfiʿ
kfgqpc-warsh.licenseNote: Use only under KFGQPC terms. Raw files are not bundled in this repository.
kfgqpc-warsh.provenanceWarning: Local file came from a GitHub mirror (thetruetruth/quran-data-kfgqpc), not a direct download from qurancomplex.gov.sa. Local MD5 (44d9aa338325a76a91ff86573bf72a3e) and SHA-1 (98fd8435de6b68708c7c4b4724e803ffcd5ddd3b) do NOT match KFGQPC's published package values (MD5 4701e8bbf053098220cf2cf4cda206a1, SHA-1 44ecea8feb23817fdc01a8ee2162a6a0cf08cae7). Mismatch is consistent with the local file being a JSON extract from KFGQPC's published package archive, but the chain of custody for that extract is not verified. Re-download the package directly from https://qurancomplex.gov.sa/quran-dev/, verify its package hash matches the published value, then extract the JSON to upgrade authorityStatus to official_confirmed.
kfgqpc-warsh.notes: KFGQPC Warsh ʿan Nāfiʿ JSON. KFGQPC's published package hashes (per https://qurancomplex.gov.sa/quran-dev/ as of 2026-05-04): MD5 4701e8bbf053098220cf2cf4cda206a1, SHA-1 44ecea8feb23817fdc01a8ee2162a6a0cf08cae7. Local file MD5: 44d9aa338325a76a91ff86573bf72a3e, SHA-1: 98fd8435de6b68708c7c4b4724e803ffcd5ddd3b, SHA-256: f05d0dc652fd46b38563cacb13242f76f80db4cc64d25873da0bce157253872f.
